tokens.text: can dig specific blocks faster, efficiency enchantment applies

fields.title: Use Efficiency
fields.description: When true, the Efficiency enchantment will increase the dig speed of this item. Default is false.

fields.title: Destroy Speeds
fields.description: An array of objects that define which blocks this item can dig and at what speed. Each entry specifies a block (by ID or tag query) and a speed multiplier.

description: Configures an item as a digging tool, allowing it to break specific blocks faster than normal. Define which blocks are affected and the speed multiplier for each.
title: Item Components Digger
